name: Pumpkin & Mozarella Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the thinly sliced onion and garlic in margarine until golden brown. Peel the pumpkin and cook until tender. Drain well, then mash.
2. Mix together the mashed pumpkin, onion mixture, and sage. Add salt and pepper to taste. Grease a 30cm  20cm lasagne dish. Place a layer of lasagne sheets in the base of the dish, top with a third of the pumpkin mixture, then a third of the combined cheeses.
3. Repeat with the remaining lasagne sheets, pumpkin, and cheese.
4. Mix the sour cream with the chopped chives. Spread the cream over the top of the dish.
5. Bake in a moderate oven for 35-40 minutes until lightly browned and cooked through. Sprinkle with the almonds.
Enjoy!
